initial_entry.name: Sealmark
initial_entry.author: Yitebeier Aikebaier
initial_entry.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Private proof of existence for your notes. Hash locally, anchor to Bitcoin via OpenTimestamps, verify offline. Your content never leaves your machine; only a hash is published.
